transcript.text:
(Rest stops)
(that relax exhausted drivers)
(But)
(everyone at the rest stop is in shock...)
How can she eat all of that?!?
(I got all)
(the rest stop food you know)
(I have breaks but I never take breaks from eating) It's my first time eating this much rest stop food
(Mukbang without any breaks!)
(People are coming up nonstop!)
(Let's go to the rest stop that has become a tourist attraction)
Hello, everyone
Today,
I'm going to Seoul from my hometown
I'm planning to eat at a rest stop
I'm going to the famous rest stop eatery, 'Cheonan-Samgeori Service Area'

I have to eat walnut cookies in Cheonan
What else should I eat there?
(Only ate light meals at rest stops...) Ramyun with 1 roll of kimbap...
I always ate like that because I was in a hurry
(Letting loose) But I'm gonna eat as much as I want today
I'll arrive in 10 minutes
Oh, there's traffic already
I'm excited
(Driving in the rain...)
(Arrived)
(Rest stop eatery on the way to Seoul, 'Cheonan-Samgeori Service Area')
(The full parking lot proves how great it is...)
I've arrived
(Found a parking space) There's a spot!
I'll go eat now!
('Cheonan-Samgeori Service Area' is crowded with people)

I came to 'Cheonan-Samgeori Service Area'
Where can I find street food?
(Found it) It must be over there!
(Snack corner) It's here! Walnut cookies
(The representative of Cheonan's specialty, 'Walnut cookies')
Can I get the snack bags
- of custard cream and luxury walnut cookies? - The small one?
(Got them)
Wow, what should I get next?
Next...
Oh here! This
I gotta eat fish cake bars and skewers
(Another must-eat food at rest stops, various skewers!)
You must eat whole potato these days
(Savory and flavorful) Whole potatoes are a must at rest stops!
(Getting this and that...)

If there's not enough time for skewers,
I'll eat them in the car
(So I should order more hehe)
(Finished at the snack corner!) Thank you
Whole potatoes! They're amazing
Tteokbokki too!
Next,
I have to eat at the food court
(Food court where you can enjoy various types of food) There's a convenience store, food court here
There's a kiosk here too
(Meaning of ex) It says 'ex ramyun' here
('Ex menu' is the representative menu of each rest stop) Is this ramyun for highways?
ex ramyun
Should I eat the Garlic Donkatsu?
It says Haeju Bibimbap is the best so I'll try that
Eomuk Udon

Cold buckwheat noodles! That's it!
I'll just eat this much
(So much)
(A stack of exchange tickets...)
(Official representative menu of rest stops, ex ramyun)
(North Korean light bibimbap, Haeju Bibimbap)
(A simple but hearty meal, Garlic Donkatsu)
(The best in the summer, cold buckwheat noodles)
(Ready to eat!) It's out!
(After getting all the food...) Your food is out, please come to the stall
(All set to go) I set all the dishes like this
(Got all the delicious food at 'Cheonan-Samgeori Service Area') It's my first time eating this much at a rest stop
I don't know if she can eat a lot
How can she eat all of that?
(1 vote for impossible) That's a lot of food
Can she eat that much?

If you include the snacks, that could be 10 servings
(Real fan) I really like Tzuyang
(Fan who watched hew New York videos) You know the videos she took in the US
The grilled steak
(Real fan confirmed) I watched it all, all her videos
I'm jealous! I want to eat like that too...
I should eat this first
Small potato!
I gotta
eat this
One bite!
It's delicious!
Hm?
It's cooked so well...!
I really like whole potatoes
There aren't a lot that are fluffy

at rest stops
so I'm always disappointed
but this is very fluffy and well-cooked
(No red pepper paste for bibimbap?) Isn't there red pepper paste?
(Is it just plain bibimbap?) What? There's no red pepper paste
Ah, you don't have red pepper paste with this
It's soy sauce bibimbap
(North Korean Haeju Bibimbap!) Add lots of soy sauce
There's walnuts as a side dish
(Delicious walnuts as a side dish is so Cheonan!) They had walnut bibimbap too
It's delicious
I like red pepper paste bibimbap
so I didn't really expect much for
soy sauce bibimbap
It's good because the soy sauce is good
(So good)

It doesn't have beef in it
It has chicken
The sauce made out of soy sauce is good
Kimchi!
(Oh my)
Delicious!
The seaweed soup is good too
(Located in the south of Hwanghae-do) 'Haeju' is the name of the region, and this is sea cucumber
The sea cucumber is very chewy and delicious
It's delicious
But...
I know
it's dessert
(How can I resist this...?!) but I should try the walnut cookies first
Other food is waiting for me too
but I gotta try the walnut cookies first

It's so good!
It's very rich and sweet
(Next is cold buckwheat noodles without veggies...haha) They were sad that I took out all the vegetables
(A must for summer) This is it for summer! It's so refreshing
And the broth is so delicious
I honestly thought that udon, jjajangmyeon, and ramyun
were the best at rest stops
(Cold buckwheat noodles that's just as great) This is the best to eat in the summer
Wow, it's so refreshing
It's so delicious
Wow, it's so refreshing
A must at rest stops, tteokbokki!
It's good!
I like rest stop tteokbokki
because it's mostly rice tteok
I envy your talent

(Amount of food eaten today) 1/3 of a plate
That must be 20 times... 30 times that
They're all representative food of rest stops
What should I try first..?
Should I go with the sausage?
It's crunchy sausage
I'll finish the bibimbap
I should eat the donkatsu!
Honestly, I didn't expect much
(This is how good rest stop donkatsu is?) for the rest stop donkatsu
I thought it'd be small but it's huge!
What? This is so big!
It's huge!
(Covered in sauce...!)
Wow, donkatsu
The meat is thick too

(Unique sauce) It's sour
Teriyaki sauce? I can taste a lot of garlic too
It's delicious!
(Wow, she's eating so much... haha)
Oh... She's eating that all by herself?
(Can't help but film it...) Amazing
This is my mom's phone!
(A surprise for his mom's phone...)
(After checking the gallery) Miss, you're gonna eat all of this?
Oh my...
(My phone this time) No way...
(I wanna a photo too) You got this!
Next...
Sotteok sotteok
Sotteok sotteok is also a must
at rest stops

It's so delicious
(Finally time for ramyun) I'm gonna move this here
Oh, it's delicious
Wow, this is really good
(Official representative menu of rest stops) It says 'ex ramyun'
There are a lot of ingredients inside!
It's delicious!
Rest stops are all about ramyun
Wow, delicious
Tornado potato!
I love this
so I just got it for me
It's so good!
It's warm and crispy
I should put the rice in the soup
(Add)

(Korean dessert is rice...!)
Scoop up the soup like this
Ah, this is nice
I tried the walnut cookie earlier and it was so good
I'll try the custard cream one this time
It has custard cream inside
It's yummy!
(Gasp)
She's very amazing...
One bowl left!
Yah...
Udon at the rest stop
(It's approaching dinner time...) It's dinner time so there are a lot of customers
As expected, udon
is another must at rest stops
Sotteok sotteok

The sauce is
kinda like sweet chili fried chicken
It's like the old-fashioned tteok skewer sauce too
It's very delicious
(Escaped)
Fail!
I should have walnut cookies
for dessert now
The red bean filling
inside the walnut cookies
is so soft and yummy
(Getting every last bit) It's the best eating this part of the tornado potato
Fish cake bar!
It's delicious
And it's so big!
All their skewers are so big!

I don't eat ketchup or mustard
so I'm just eating it plain
It's still good
(Blueberry) Thank you
It's so good!
(Eating tteokbokki without even breathing...)
It's getting pretty late
(Eating the rest in the car!) Oh yeah, I'm gonna eat the walnut cookies and skewers in the car
(Putting them all in one bag)
I'll eat these in the car
(Enjoy your meal) It's almost summer break so you'll probably be on the highway a lot
(and drive safely on your way out!) Eat a lot of delicious food at the rest stop
I had a great meal today as well!
You ate all of this?
(So selfish! Haha) But why are you so slim?
- Why are you so pretty? - (Let's take a photo)

(Finished this delicious meal...)
(It's already dark now)
(Starting round 2)
(Eating rest stop snacks in the car is the best hehe)
(Eating and eating...)
(until she arrives...)
(Have a great summer break, everyone!)
